benefits.description: No clear evidence of telomere lengthening; maintains general health and fitness into late 50s
No aches or pains; knees and back in good condition despite physically demanding job
Can bike all day without significant issues; minor soreness after busy shifts appears normal

protocol_notes: Used Epithalon sporadically (once or twice yearly) from approximately 2016-2024. Originally planned extensive telomere testing protocol but companies went out of business (Titanova ceased operations during COVID). Had two telomere tests via Titanova in 2017 but no data reported. Doses were described as 'excessive amounts' and 'probably double' standard recommendations. Currently age 58, maintains excellent health and fitness. Uncertain if Epithalon contributed to current health status vs. lifestyle factors (stress-free, active job in tropical location).
